title: Vibration inspection — cooling water pump
text:
INSPECTION REPORT
Date: 2025-06-01
Inspector: Suresh Nair
Equipment: P-101A (Cooling Water Pump A)
Finding: VT-101 radial vibration measured at 4.7 mm/s RMS, dominant frequency 47 Hz. Drive-end bearing temperature 68 °C. Trend rising from 2.1 mm/s baseline. ISO 10816-3 Zone C. Suspected upstream hydraulic excitation from control valve V-201 cavitation. Recommend expediting V-201 trim replacement per OISD-STD-130 rotating-equipment monitoring requirements. Next inspection due 2025-06-15.

title: RE: V-201 noise complaint — shutdown planning
text:
From: Priya Mehta <priya.mehta@octaveplant.in>
To: Rajesh Kumar
Date: 2025-04-04
Subject: RE: V-201 noise

Rajesh — confirmed crackling/cavitation on V-201 during today's field walk. Body vibration 6.8 mm/s, acoustic emission 72 dB. Trim is ~15% worn. I've raised WO-2025-0891. We need the trim replacement in the May shutdown window. This is now driving elevated vibration on P-101A downstream. Please stage parts. — Priya

title: Centrifugal pump O&M manual — vibration limits
text:
SECTION 7 — CONDITION MONITORING
Model: HES-350 end-suction centrifugal pump
Per ISO 10816-3, alarm at 4.5 mm/s RMS and trip at 7.1 mm/s RMS for this machine class. Sustained operation above 4.5 mm/s indicates misalignment, unbalance, cavitation or bearing wear. Inspect suction strainer and upstream control valve for cavitation. Bearing temperature should not exceed 80 °C. Refer failure modes PU-C-VIB and PU-C-BRG.

title: OISD-STD-130 compliance declaration — rotating equipment
text:
COMPLIANCE DECLARATION — OISD-STD-130
Facility: Octave Demo Plant, Area A-01
Clause 6.2 requires vibration and bearing-temperature monitoring of critical rotating equipment at intervals not exceeding 90 days, with trended records maintained. Equipment in scope: P-101A, P-101B, K-501, M-101A, M-501. Prepared by Anil Sharma, 2025-05-20. Also references Factories Act 1948 §21 and PESO SMPV(U) Rules for pressure systems.

title: Near-miss — heat exchanger fouling excursion
text:
NEAR-MISS RECORD
Date: 2024-11-01
Reported by: Anil Sharma
Equipment: HE-301 (Process Cooling Heat Exchanger)
Shell-side pressure drop rose to 1.8 bar versus 1.1 bar design; CW outlet temperature +2.3 °C. Fouling factor elevated. Root cause: inadequate water treatment. Failure mode HE-FOL. Recommend chemical clean and CPCB cooling-water quality review. Potential downstream impact on P-101A/B effective head.

title: Night-shift handover note
text:
HANDOVER — Night Shift, 2025-06-01, Operator: Deepa Rao
Watch P-101A — vibration creeping up (4.7 mm/s tonight). Old trick from the retiring foreman: after any V-201 cavitation event, always re-clearance the P-101A impeller, it never seats right otherwise. If VT-101 crosses 6.0, switch to P-101B before it trips at 7.1.
